data.id: TR-RECON-001: LDAP Reconnaissance via WLDAP32 Ordinals
data.name: TR-RECON-001: LDAP Reconnaissance via WLDAP32 Ordinals
data.description: Detects wldap32.dll loaded by processes outside normal LDAP consumers. Multiple WLDAP32 ordinals (309, 304, 310, 77, 157) appear at Score=100 with MalCount 12-15, indicating Active Directory enumeration by credential-dumping or lateral-movement tools (BloodHound, ADFind, SharpHound).
data.contents: process.modules contains 'wldap32.dll' AND process.name != 'lsass.exe' AND process.name != 'svchost.exe' AND process.name != 'dsac.exe' AND process.name != 'mmc.exe' AND process.name != 'ldp.exe' AND process.name != 'adsiedit.msc' AND process.name != 'outlook.exe' AND process.name != 'explorer.exe' AND process.name != 'searchindexer.exe'
